svg.title: ScanZapp AI Platform Architecture
svg.desc: Detailed request and response architecture with separate horizontal lanes for data, food analysis, meal suggestions, and chatbot services.
svg.text: Detailed Request / Response Lanes • Vercel + Supabase + Purpose-Specific AI Models
Both browser types enter the same responsive frontend application.
One frontend shared by desktop and mobile browsers
Protected API routes validate the session before business logic runs.
AI routes are throttled independently to control latency and usage.
Each row is an independent lane; no connector crosses another lane.
The five data lanes enter the same database through separate ports.
Prisma ORM handles application data access; Session Guard handles identity.
sign in, sign up, sign out
Only Scan, Meal Suggestions, and Chat call AI models. All other lanes terminate at PostgreSQL.
Model routing verified from application configuration
